title: Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple
tagline: Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple is located at Chemancheri village in Kozhikode district, in Kerala, India.
overview.description: Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple is located at Chemancheri village in Kozhikode district, in Kerala, India. The presiding deity of the temple is Lord Shiva, located in main Sanctum Sanctorum, facing west. According to folklore, sage Parashurama has installed the idol. It is the part of the 108 Shiva Temples of Kerala.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Varavoor
topPlaces.description: Varavoor, a residential village in Thrissur district is in the state of Kerala, India. It is widely believed that this village was situated on the banks of Bharathapuzha during prehistoric times.

topPlaces.name: Mullurkara
topPlaces.description: Mullurkara is a village in Thalapilly Taluk of Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. The Malayalam film actress Philomina was born here.

topPlaces.name: Attoor (Kerala)
topPlaces.description: Attoor is a village that is located in Kerala, India, in the Thrissur district. It has an area of roughly 48 square kilometers (18.5 square miles).

topPlaces.name: Nedumpura Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple
topPlaces.description: Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple is a Shiva temple situated at Nedumpura neighbourhood in Thrissur in the state of Kerala, India. It is one among the 108 Shiva Temples in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Desamangalam
topPlaces.description: Desamangalam is a village in Thrissur district which located in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Chittanda
topPlaces.description: Chittanda is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. The place is renowned for the Karthyayani temple.

topPlaces.name: Pallimanna Siva Temple
topPlaces.description: Pallimanna Siva Temple is a temple located at Kumbalangad, a small village in Thrissur District, Kerala, India. The temple is located at Kumbalangad - Kanjirakode Road, Vadakkancherry.

topPlaces.name: Uthralikavu Pooram
topPlaces.description: Uthralikkavu Pooram (ഉത്രാളിക്കാവ്) is a festival held at Shri Rudhiramahakalikav (ശ്രീ രുധിരമഹാകാളികാവ്) temple situated at Wadakkanchery in Thalappilly taluk of Thrissur district in Kerala, South India. The temple is famed for its Pooram festival held during February / March every year.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (82 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kanjilassery Maha Siva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Varavoor, Mullurkara, Attoor (Kerala), Nedumpura Kulasekharanellur Shiva Temple, Desamangalam.
